name: esp-mcp-toolchain
description: A generic stdio MCP toolchain for ESP development.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect ESP ports, logs, hardware context, and project memory.
interface.longDescription: Use a local stdio MCP server to expose ESP development tools, resources, prompts, hardware context, logs, and project memory to Codex. High-risk actions remain gated by explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: List ESP MCP tools and read the hardware context.
Check the selected ESP serial port and latest logs.
Search project memory before debugging an ESP issue.
